professionalSummary.default: Full stack MERN Developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Express and Node.js. Focused on clean architecture, performance optimization, and delivering production-grade solutions.

experience.title: SDE (Full Stack Developer)

projects.name: TrackWave – Fleet Management & Logistics Platform
projects.description: Large-scale B2B SaaS platform for managing fleet operations and logistics, used by transport companies and warehouse operators across India. Built real-time vehicle tracking with map integrations, route optimization dashboards, driver management modules, and automated alert systems for delivery SLA breaches. Implemented WebSocket-based live location updates, role-based access control for fleet managers and drivers, and MongoDB aggregation pipelines for analytics reporting. Improved API response times by 15x through proper indexing and query optimization.

projects.name: PayrollHub Internal System
projects.description: Multi-tenant HR and payroll platform supporting multiple organizations with role-based access control (Super Admin, Admin, HR, Employee). Delivered modules for employee onboarding, attendance, leave management, and payroll processing with tax calculations. Implemented biometric attendance integration and complex salary computation logic with configurable business rules.

projects.name: ShopGrid – E-commerce Marketplace Platform
projects.description: Multi-vendor e-commerce platform with seller dashboards, product catalog management, order processing workflows, and real-time inventory tracking. Built responsive React UI with component-based architecture, integrated payment gateway APIs, and implemented search with filters and sorting using Elasticsearch-backed queries. Added real-time chat between buyers and sellers using Socket.io and internationalization support for Hindi and English.

projects.name: QuickChat – Team Communication App
projects.description: Internal team communication tool with channels, direct messaging, file sharing, and threaded conversations. Built with Next.js frontend and Express backend using PostgreSQL for structured data and Redis for session management and caching. Implemented real-time messaging with Socket.io, file upload to S3, and notification system with email and push notification support.

projects.name: DesignBoard – Cloud Billing & Inventory
projects.description: Cloud-based billing and inventory management platform for retail businesses. Implemented invoice generation, stock tracking with alerts, party/ledger management, and GST compliance workflows. Built with React frontend and Express backend on MySQL with comprehensive input validation and security measures.

bullets: Built & maintained 5+ production web applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript & Tailwind CSS, delivering responsive, scalable solutions
Improved page load times and Core Web Vitals by 40% through code splitting, lazy loading, and webpack optimization
Integrated Redux Toolkit & React Query for optimized state management across complex frontend applications
Optimized backend performance on MongoDB and SQL databases through indexing and aggregation pipelines, reducing API response time by 10x
Developed fleet management platform (TrackWave) with real-time WebSocket tracking, automated alerts, and comprehensive security practices
Built multi-tenant payroll system with biometric attendance integration, leave management, and policy-based access control
Created multi-vendor e-commerce platform (ShopGrid) with payment integration, real-time chat, and i18n support
Collaborated with cross-functional teams through Agile/Scrum methodology, performed code reviews and mentored junior developers
Implemented clean architecture patterns, component-based design, and system design patterns for maintainable codebases
Managed production support, troubleshooting, and incident resolution across multiple applications

experience.title: Web Development Intern
bullets: Built REST APIs and frontend components using Node.js and React
Developed automation scripts for data processing and reporting tasks
Gained hands-on experience in debugging, testing, and API integration
Worked on internal tools for team productivity and workflow management

projects.name: LangBridge (Freelance, Japan)
projects.description: Web application for Japanese language learning with secure authentication and role-based access control supporting Teacher/Student modes. Teachers created lessons and assignments; students submitted audio recordings for review and pronunciation feedback. Built responsive React UI with TypeScript + Express backend on MySQL, comprehensive input validation, and automated tests using Jest with TDD practices. Integrated third-party AI API for pronunciation evaluation.

projects.name: ResumeForge (ATS Tailoring Tool)
projects.description: AI-powered resume tailoring tool with CLI and React web UI. Implements clipboard integration for job description extraction, uses structured JSON resume profile as knowledge base, runs keyword extraction and ATS scoring algorithms, and generates tailored resume outputs with skill-claim validation. Integrated multiple LLM APIs including AWS Bedrock and Google Gemini with prompt engineering, cost tracking via CloudWatch, and comprehensive logging.

projects.name: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Next.js portfolio website with multi-theme support, responsive design, animations using Framer Motion and GSAP, dynamic content rendering, and SSR for SEO. Deployed on AWS EC2 with Nginx reverse proxy, blue-green deployment, CI/CD via GitHub Actions, and Docker containerization.

stackUsed.devops: Docker, AWS EC2, Nginx, GitHub Actions
